product_overview: EuroStore is a high-end luxury e-commerce platform with web, mobile, and admin experiences. It supports shopping, search, checkout, tracking, loyalty, and operational workflows on top of Supabase-backed authentication and data services.
core_goals: Provide a premium multilingual shopping experience for luxury products
Enable secure user authentication and account management
Support discovery through smart search, categories, brands, and product variants
Offer a reliable cart-to-checkout purchase flow
Give customers visibility into order status, loyalty points, and referrals
Equip partners, warehouse staff, and admins with operational tools
Integrate wishlist and WhatsApp-based customer engagement

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows customers and staff to sign in and access protected parts of the platform using email and password.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with authenticated session/JWT -> GET /profile with token -> Receive user account details
POST /auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with error message -> User remains unauthenticated

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Lets users browse categories, brands, products, and product variants across the storefront.
user_flows: GET /catalog/categories -> Receive 200 with category list -> GET /catalog/brands -> Receive 200 with brand list -> GET /catalog/products?category={id} -> Receive 200 with matching products -> GET /catalog/products/{productId} -> Receive product details and variants
GET /catalog/products?category=invalid -> Receive 404 or 400 with validation/error payload

features.name: Smart Search
features.description: Provides full-text search over the catalog, including Arabic-language support.
user_flows: GET /search?q=عباية -> Receive 200 with ranked Arabic search results -> User opens product from results via GET /catalog/products/{productId} -> Receive product detail
GET /search?q=nonexistentterm -> Receive 200 with empty results or 404-style search response indicating no matches

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Maintains a persistent cart so users can add, update, and remove items before checkout.
user_flows: POST /cart/items with product variant and quantity -> Receive 200 with updated cart -> GET /cart -> Receive 200 with persisted cart contents -> PATCH /cart/items/{itemId} to change quantity -> Receive 200 with recalculated totals
POST /cart/items with unavailable variant or invalid quantity -> Receive 400 with error message

features.name: End-to-End Checkout
features.description: Converts the cart into a paid or confirmed order and creates the customer order record.
user_flows: GET /cart -> Receive 200 with current items -> POST /checkout with shipping and payment details -> Receive 201 with order confirmation and order id -> GET /orders/{orderId} -> Receive 200 with order summary and status
POST /checkout with missing required fields or invalid payment data -> Receive 400 or 422 with validation errors

features.name: Customer Order Tracking
features.description: Allows customers to view order status and shipment progress after checkout.
user_flows: GET /orders -> Receive 200 with customer order history -> GET /orders/{orderId} -> Receive 200 with current status, line items, and tracking details
GET /orders/{orderId} with unauthorized or non-owned order id -> Receive 403 or 404 with error response

features.name: Loyalty Points System
features.description: Tracks customer points in real time and exposes balances and point activity.
user_flows: GET /loyalty/points -> Receive 200 with current points balance -> POST /loyalty/points/redeem with valid redemption request -> Receive 200 with updated balance and redemption record
POST /loyalty/points/redeem with insufficient points -> Receive 400 with error explaining redemption failure

features.name: Referrals System
features.description: Lets customers generate referral codes and track referrals and rewards.
user_flows: GET /referrals/code -> Receive 200 with customer referral code -> POST /referrals/claim with valid code -> Receive 200 with referral attribution and reward status
POST /referrals/claim with invalid or expired code -> Receive 400 with error message

features.name: Partner App
features.description: Supports sales agents who create or manage customer-facing sales workflows through a dedicated mobile app.
user_flows: POST /partner/login with valid agent credentials -> Receive 200 with partner session -> GET /partner/customers -> Receive 200 with assigned customer list -> POST /partner/orders with customer and cart data -> Receive 201 with created order
POST /partner/orders with missing customer data -> Receive 400 with validation error

features.name: Helper App
features.description: Supports warehouse operations such as inventory handling, picking, and fulfillment.
user_flows: GET /warehouse/tasks -> Receive 200 with pending picking/fulfillment tasks -> PATCH /warehouse/tasks/{taskId} with updated status -> Receive 200 with task completion confirmation
PATCH /warehouse/tasks/{taskId} for invalid task or unauthorized user -> Receive 403 or 404 with error response

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provides administrators with management access to users, products, orders, loyalty, and operational data.
user_flows: POST /admin/login with valid admin credentials -> Receive 200 with admin session -> GET /admin/orders -> Receive 200 with order management list -> PATCH /admin/orders/{orderId} -> Receive 200 with updated order state
POST /admin/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with authentication error

features.name: Arabic/English Localization
features.description: Allows the interface and content to be presented in either Arabic or English.
user_flows: GET /i18n/locale -> Receive 200 with current locale -> PATCH /i18n/locale with 'ar' or 'en' -> Receive 200 with saved locale preference
PATCH /i18n/locale with unsupported locale value -> Receive 400 with validation error

features.name: Wishlist
features.description: Lets users save products for later viewing and manage saved items.
user_flows: POST /wishlist/items with product id -> Receive 200 with wishlist item added -> GET /wishlist -> Receive 200 with saved items -> DELETE /wishlist/items/{itemId} -> Receive 200 confirming removal
POST /wishlist/items with invalid product id -> Receive 404 or 400 with error response

features.name: WhatsApp Integration
features.description: Enables users to contact support or share product/order details through WhatsApp.
user_flows: POST /integrations/whatsapp/share with product or order payload -> Receive 200 with generated WhatsApp share link or message payload
POST /integrations/whatsapp/share with incomplete payload -> Receive 400 with validation error

features: Full-Text Smart Search with Arabic support
